Veterans Benefits: Georgia provides retirement-income adjustments for eligible residents age 62+ and military-retirement exclusions; qualifying disabled veterans receive an indexed homestead exemption.
LGBTQSource: MAP Georgia overall policy score; municipal MEI score not located
Description: Marietta is a Cobb County city northwest of Atlanta with a local VA clinic and Dobbins Air Reserve Base. Downtown Marietta Square offers museums, theatre, and community events; the city has 18 parks and is near Kennesaw Mountain National Battlefield Park.
